TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kin'lwan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 21 buwan, 66 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspung Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kin Ēlwan …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpuŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a ńßő≤un-s~…ēinqumi. taj Ēzil na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a pjas~…ēan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Kin'lwan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 21 buwan, 66 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspung Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kin'lwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kin'lwan hya' ga Hbun-sinqumi. tay 'zil na Kin'lwan hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kin Ēlwan …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpuŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a ńßő≤un-s~…ēinqumi. taj Ēzil na kin Ēlwan ńßja Ē …£a pjas~…ēan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
